client_request: We need a system where customers can book appointments online, get reminders, and admin can manage bookings. It should be simple, mobile-friendly, and maybe include reports later.

projectOverview.clientDescription: We need a system where customers can book appointments online, get reminders, and admin can manage bookings. It should be simple, mobile-friendly, and maybe include reports later.
projectOverview.cleanDescription: Develop an intuitive, mobile-friendly web-based system enabling customers to conveniently book appointments online and receive automated reminders. The system will also empower administrators with comprehensive tools to efficiently manage all bookings and service offerings.
projectOverview.businessGoal: To enhance customer convenience and operational efficiency by digitalizing the appointment booking and management process for businesses.

objectives: To provide a seamless online platform for customers to book, view, and manage their appointments.
To equip administrators with robust tools for efficient management of appointments, services, and availability.
To improve customer satisfaction through timely and automated appointment reminders.
To deliver a highly intuitive and mobile-responsive user experience for both customers and administrators.

stakeholders.description: Individuals who need to book, view, and manage appointments online.
Personnel responsible for managing the booking system, services, staff availability, and customer appointments.
The client organization overseeing the deployment and operation of the appointment system.

functionalRequirements.title: Customer Appointment Booking
functionalRequirements.description: The system shall allow authenticated customers to browse available services, view real-time staff/resource availability, and book an appointment for a selected service and time slot.
acceptance_criteria: A customer can view a list of available services with descriptions and durations.
A customer can select a service and see available dates and times for booking.
A customer can successfully book an appointment by selecting a slot and confirming their details.
Upon successful booking, the customer receives an immediate on-screen confirmation and an email confirmation.

functionalRequirements.title: Customer Appointment Management
functionalRequirements.description: The system shall enable authenticated customers to view their upcoming and past appointments, as well as modify or cancel existing bookings within predefined rules.
acceptance_criteria: A customer can log in and view a personalized dashboard of their scheduled appointments.
A customer can cancel an upcoming appointment up to a configured threshold (e.g., 24 hours) prior to the scheduled time.
A customer can reschedule an upcoming appointment to an available slot, subject to cancellation/rescheduling policies.
The customer receives an email confirmation for any modification or cancellation of an appointment.

functionalRequirements.title: Automated Appointment Reminders
functionalRequirements.description: The system shall automatically send reminders to customers for their upcoming appointments via a predefined communication channel (e.g., email, SMS).
acceptance_criteria: Customers receive an automated email reminder 24 hours prior to their appointment time.
Customers receive an automated email reminder 1 hour prior to their appointment time.
The content of the reminder email includes appointment date, time, service, and location.

functionalRequirements.title: Admin Booking Management
functionalRequirements.description: The system shall provide administrators with a dedicated interface to view, create, modify, and cancel all appointments across all services and staff.
acceptance_criteria: An administrator can log in and view a comprehensive list or calendar of all appointments.
An administrator can filter and search appointments by customer, service, staff, or date range.
An administrator can manually create a new appointment for a customer, assigning a service and staff member.
An administrator can edit the details (e.g., time, service, staff) or cancel any existing appointment.
Changes made by an administrator to an existing appointment trigger appropriate notifications to the affected customer.

functionalRequirements.title: Admin Service & Availability Management
functionalRequirements.description: The system shall allow administrators to define and manage services offered, staff associated with services, and their respective availability.
acceptance_criteria: An administrator can add, edit, or remove services offered by the business, including name, description, and duration.
An administrator can define staff members and assign them to specific services.
An administrator can configure daily working hours and block out unavailable periods (e.g., holidays, breaks) for individual staff members or services.

functionalRequirements.title: User Authentication & Authorization
functionalRequirements.description: The system shall securely authenticate users (customers and administrators) and authorize access based on their assigned roles.
acceptance_criteria: Customers can register for a new account using an email address and secure password.
Authenticated customers can log in to access their personalized features.
Administrators can log in via a separate secure portal and access administrative functions.
Forgotten password functionality is available for both customer and administrator accounts.

nonFunctionalRequirements.title: User Experience & Simplicity
nonFunctionalRequirements.description: The system shall provide an intuitive and easy-to-use interface for both customers and administrators, minimizing the learning curve and requiring minimal steps to complete key tasks.

nonFunctionalRequirements.title: Cross-Device Compatibility
nonFunctionalRequirements.description: The customer-facing and administrator interfaces shall be fully responsive and optimized for seamless viewing and interaction across various devices and screen sizes (desktop, tablet, mobile phones).

nonFunctionalRequirements.title: System Response Time
nonFunctionalRequirements.description: Key user actions, such as booking an appointment, loading availability, or loading the administrator dashboard, shall complete within 3 seconds under normal load conditions (up to 100 concurrent users).

nonFunctionalRequirements.title: Data Protection & Access Control
nonFunctionalRequirements.description: The system shall protect all sensitive user and appointment data through appropriate encryption (in transit and at rest) and robust access control mechanisms, ensuring compliance with data privacy best practices.

nonFunctionalRequirements.title: Future Growth & Reporting Readiness
nonFunctionalRequirements.description: The system architecture shall be designed to accommodate future expansions, including potential integration of comprehensive reporting functionalities and an increase in the number of users and appointments without significant performance degradation.

assumptions: Users (customers and administrators) will have stable internet access to effectively use the system.
The client will provide all necessary data regarding services, staff availability, business hours, and holiday schedules prior to system configuration.
Automated reminders will be delivered primarily via email, potentially integrating with a third-party email service provider.
Initial scope focuses solely on appointment booking and management; payment processing and multi-location management are not part of this initial phase.
The system will manage appointments for a single business entity, with internal staff as bookable resources.
constraints: The system must be a web-based application, accessible via standard web browsers (e.g., Chrome, Firefox, Safari, Edge).
Development must adhere to a target project timeline of three to four months for the initial release.
The system must comply with general data protection regulations (e.g., GDPR, CCPA) for customer data privacy.
acceptanceCriteria: Customers can successfully book an appointment online, receive an instant confirmation, and an email confirmation.
Administrators can view, create, modify, and cancel all scheduled appointments through their dedicated interface.
Automated reminders are consistently sent to customers at predefined intervals before their appointments.
The system's user interface is fully functional, intuitive, and responsive across desktop, tablet, and mobile devices.
